# ConverterUp

> Convert images and videos instantly, 100% in your browser. No uploads, no servers, no compromises.

ConverterUp is a browser-based media conversion tool powered by FFmpeg.wasm (WebAssembly). All processing happens client-side — files never leave the user's device.

## What ConverterUp Does

- Converts images between formats: PNG, JPG, WebP, AVIF, GIF, TIFF, BMP
- Converts videos between formats: MP4, WebM, MKV, AVI, MOV
- Extracts audio from video: MP3, AAC, WAV, OGG
- Adjusts quality, resolution, and aspect ratio
- Works on desktop and mobile browsers

## Key Differentiators

- **100% client-side**: No file uploads. All conversion happens in the browser using WebAssembly.
- **Privacy-first**: Files never touch a server. Zero data collection on file contents.
- **No watermarks**: Output files are clean, regardless of plan.
- **No file size limits imposed by the service**: Limited only by the user's device memory (typically up to 500MB for images, 1-2GB for videos).

## Pricing

- **Free**: 3 conversions per day, all formats, full quality control, no watermarks, no ads.
- **Unlimited**: $5/month, unlimited conversions, priority support, cancel anytime.

## Technology

- Built with Next.js, React, and FFmpeg.wasm
- Uses WebAssembly for near-native performance in the browser
- Supports SharedArrayBuffer for multi-threaded video processing

## Links

- Website: https://converterup.com
- Dashboard: https://converterup.com/dashboard
